response.summary: The current user-facing app flow does not surface the SL-006 Profile Area and Household Preferences experience. Although related source files exist, the implemented UI exposed through the app only routes users to onboarding, family overview, plan, and vaccinations, so the required profile area and preferences semantics are not actually available to users.

findings.observed: The app does not import or render the ProfileAreaAndHouseholdPreferences surface. Current routing only exposes onboarding, family, plan, and vaccinations views, so users never see a profile area or preferences heading that explains this slice's purpose.
